mnemonics.title: CRUD Operations
mnemonics.content: Create (insert), Read (find), Update (update), Delete (remove) - Remember the basic operations with the acronym CRUD.

mnemonics.title: Aggregation Pipeline Stages
mnemonics.content: My Great Students Pass Exams - Match, Group, Sort, Project, (and many more stages)

mnemonics.title: Index Types
mnemonics.content: Some Cats Make Terrible Garden Holes - Single field, Compound, Multikey, Text, Geospatial, Hashed indexes
